description: Add-field intent is classified correctly and routed to forms-content-update workflow — calls get-aem-page-content then patch
userMessage: Add an email field to my contact us form at /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1

rubric.description: The model identifies this as an add-field operation (not add-rule, create-form, or modify-property)
The model calls patch-aem-page-content with an 'add' operation to insert the email field
The patch payload includes the correct component type for emailinput (e.g. .../form/emailinput) and fieldType=email
